channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Snow will greet 49ers in Buffalo but heavy stuff done by game time
item.description: Heavy, lake-effect snow will fall on Buffalo this weekend as the 49ers arrive to face the Bills on Sunday night in the suburb of Orchard Park, where the storm front is expected to pass through by game time.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Hunter's big game bolsters Heisman hopes as No. 23 Colorado rolls to 52-0 win over Oklahoma State
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Travis Hunter strengthened his Heisman hopes with three touchdown catches and an interception as No. 23 Colorado routed Oklahoma State 52-0 on Friday to keep its outside Big 12 title game hopes afloat. Hunter finished with 10 receptions for 116 yards.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants head coach Brian Daboll not worried about his job after his team was first eliminated from playoffs
item.description: Brian Daboll's New York Giants are 2-10 just two seasons after making the playoffs, but he is not worried about losing his job in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College sports reform could advance in GOP-controlled Congress, with Sen. Ted Cruz as NCAA ally
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The NCAA's yearslong efforts to get lawmakers to address myriad problems in college sports could finally pay off in the new, Republican-controlled Congress. Sen.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Halep dismayed at how Swiatek's doping case was handled compared to her own
item.description: Simona Halep, the former Wimbledon and French Open champion tennis player, has expressed dismay at the way Iga Swiatek's doping case was handled compared to her own.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL football on Thanksgiving
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Dallas Cowboys ended a six-game home losing streak with a 27-20 victory over the New York Giants on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lions extend win streak to 10 games, hold off Bears for 23-20 victory
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions have been dominant for much of the season, leading the league in point differential after routinely routing opponents. Against Chicago, the Lions were good enough to extend their winning streak to 10 games. Barely.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Battle, former Tennessee coach and Alabama AD who founded licensing company, dies
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Bill Battle III, who was athletic director at his alma mater, Alabama, where he played for Paul “Bear” Bryant's first national championship team, then later coached the Tennessee Volunteers and founded the Collegiate Licensing Company, has died. He was 82.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State is disappointed Boise State forfeited but looks forward to volleyball final
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State said Thursday it was disappointed Boise State forfeited its semifinal match in the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament but that the Spartans were focused on the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani seeks $325,000 worth of baseball cards from his ex-interpreter
item.description: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani wants his former interpreter to hand over hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of baseball cards he says were fraudulently bought using his money.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake makes 2024 season-end roster decisions
item.description: Real Salt Lake has revealed its end-of-season roster decision following a record-setting 2024 campaign in Major League Soccer.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Wembanyama scores 34 as Spurs beat Jazz, 128-115
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - 17 games into the NBA season, the Utah Jazz and San Antonio Spurs have already played each other four times, and the Jazz have to be glad they don't have to see Victor Wembanyama again this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Traffic citations against Dolphins' Tyreek Hill dismissed after officers no-show at hearing
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Traffic citations issued to Miami Dolphins star wide receiver Tyreek Hill after a September altercation with police have been dismissed after the charging officers didn’t attend a court hearing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: As offense ascends, Bears defense goes on sneaky decline under Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears' defense has been struggling to stop opposing offenses, resulting in a five-game losing streak, while the offense has been unable to score enough points to win games.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New stadium, new look: Salt Lake Bees unveil 2025 logos, uniforms
item.description: It's a whole new era for the Salt Lake Bees as they prepare for their move to South Jordan where they will play in their brand new home of Daybreak Field.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Special teams miscues prove costly for Bears in overtime loss to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Cairo Santos had a field goal blocked — again. DeAndre Carter muffed a punt in the second half. And those were just the special teams mistakes for the struggling Chicago Bears.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Short-handed 49ers stomped by Packers in 38-10 road loss
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) -- Josh Jacobs rushed for 106 yards and matched a career high with three touchdowns and the Green Bay Packers trounced the short-handed San Francisco 49ers 38-10 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Montrose football dominates, off to State Final Four
item.description: The Montrose Red Hawks delivered a commanding performance in the third round of the Class 4A playoffs, defeating Mesa Ridge 53-21 on Friday night to secure their spot in the semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Michkov scores in overtime, Flyers rally to beat Blackhawks 3-2
item.description: Matvei Michkov scored a power-play goal in overtime as the Flyers overcame a two-goal deficit in the third period to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Formula 1 expected to expand grid to 11 teams as early as next week for Cadillac to enter in 2026
item.description: Formula 1 is expected to approve grid expansion for an 11th team originally started by Michael Andretti as early as next week, The Associated Press has learned.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5
